subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! This day belongeth unto the Truth, inasmuch as He Who conversed on Sinai is established upon the throne of Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی امروز بحق منسوب است چه که مکلم طور بر عرش ظهور مستوی و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
